nodes.title: Python Syntax & Variables
nodes.description: Learn Python's basic syntax, variables, data types, and operators, and write simple scripts that take input and print output.

nodes.title: Data Structures: Lists, Tuples, Dicts & Sets
nodes.description: Practice creating and manipulating Python's core collection types and understand when to use each one.

nodes.title: Functions & Modules
nodes.description: Write reusable functions with parameters and return values, and organize code into modules and packages.

nodes.title: Object-Oriented Programming in Python
nodes.description: Learn classes, objects, inheritance, and magic methods to model real-world entities in code.

nodes.title: Error Handling & File I/O
nodes.description: Use try/except blocks for robust error handling and read/write files using Python's built-in file operations.

nodes.title: Virtual Environments & Pip
nodes.description: Set up isolated environments with venv and manage third-party packages using pip and requirements files.

nodes.title: Java Syntax & JVM Basics
nodes.description: Understand Java's syntax, compilation process, and how the JVM executes bytecode.

nodes.title: OOP Principles in Java
nodes.description: Practice classes, interfaces, inheritance, and polymorphism to build well-structured Java programs.

nodes.title: Collections Framework
nodes.description: Learn List, Set, Map implementations and when to choose each collection type.

nodes.title: Exception Handling & Generics
nodes.description: Write robust code using checked/unchecked exceptions and type-safe generic classes and methods.

nodes.title: Multithreading & Concurrency Basics
nodes.description: Understand threads, synchronization, and the basics of concurrent execution in Java.

nodes.title: Build Tools: Maven & Gradle
nodes.description: Configure a Java project with Maven or Gradle, manage dependencies, and package an application.

nodes.title: Go Syntax & Tooling
nodes.description: Learn Go's syntax, the go toolchain, and how to build and run simple programs.

nodes.title: Structs, Interfaces & Methods
nodes.description: Model data with structs and define behavior with interfaces and methods.

nodes.title: Goroutines & Channels
nodes.description: Understand Go's concurrency model using goroutines and channels for safe parallel execution.

nodes.title: Error Handling Patterns
nodes.description: Learn idiomatic Go error handling, including wrapping errors and custom error types.

nodes.title: Go Modules & Package Management
nodes.description: Manage dependencies with go.mod, versioning, and organizing multi-package projects.

nodes.title: Building HTTP Servers with net/http
nodes.description: Build a basic REST endpoint using Go's standard net/http package.

nodes.title: C# Syntax & .NET Basics
nodes.description: Learn C# syntax and how the .NET runtime compiles and executes programs.

nodes.title: OOP in C#
nodes.description: Practice classes, interfaces, inheritance, and access modifiers in C#.

nodes.title: Collections & LINQ
nodes.description: Use built-in collections and LINQ to query and transform data expressively.

nodes.title: Async/Await & Tasks
nodes.description: Understand asynchronous programming in C# using async/await and the Task Parallel Library.

nodes.title: Exceptions, Delegates & Events
nodes.description: Handle errors with try/catch and implement callback patterns using delegates and events.

nodes.title: NuGet & Project Structure
nodes.description: Manage packages with NuGet and structure a typical .NET solution and project.

nodes.title: PHP Syntax & Basics
nodes.description: Learn PHP's syntax, variables, control structures, and embedding PHP in HTML.

nodes.title: Arrays, Functions & Superglobals
nodes.description: Work with arrays and functions, and use superglobals like $_GET, $_POST, and $_SESSION.

nodes.title: OOP in PHP
nodes.description: Build classes, use inheritance and interfaces, and apply OOP principles in PHP.

nodes.title: Composer & Autoloading
nodes.description: Manage dependencies with Composer and understand PSR-4 autoloading.

nodes.title: Sessions, Cookies & Forms
nodes.description: Handle user sessions, cookies, and form submissions securely.

nodes.title: Connecting to Databases with PDO
nodes.description: Use PDO to connect PHP applications to a relational database and run parameterized queries.

nodes.title: Fastify Basics & Setup
nodes.description: Set up a Fastify project and understand its performance-focused design philosophy.

nodes.title: Routing & Request/Reply Lifecycle
nodes.description: Define routes and understand the request/reply lifecycle in Fastify.

nodes.title: Schema Validation & Serialization
nodes.description: Use JSON Schema to validate input and speed up output serialization.

nodes.title: Plugins & Encapsulation
nodes.description: Build reusable Fastify plugins and understand encapsulation contexts.

nodes.title: Hooks & Middleware
nodes.description: Use lifecycle hooks to run logic at various stages of the request/response cycle.

nodes.title: Error Handling & Logging
nodes.description: Implement centralized error handling and configure Fastify's built-in logger.

nodes.title: FastAPI Basics & Setup
nodes.description: Set up a FastAPI project and create your first endpoint.

nodes.title: Path/Query Params & Pydantic Models
nodes.description: Define request data using path/query parameters and Pydantic models for validation.

nodes.title: Dependency Injection
nodes.description: Use FastAPI's dependency injection system to share logic like DB sessions across routes.

nodes.title: Async Endpoints & Background Tasks
nodes.description: Write async route handlers and offload work using background tasks.

nodes.title: Authentication & Middleware
nodes.description: Add authentication schemes and custom middleware to a FastAPI app.

nodes.title: Auto Docs & Testing
nodes.description: Explore FastAPI's automatic Swagger/OpenAPI docs and write tests with TestClient.

nodes.title: Django Project & App Structure
nodes.description: Create a Django project, understand app structure, and the request/response cycle.

nodes.title: Models & ORM Basics
nodes.description: Define models and use Django's ORM to query and manipulate data.

nodes.title: Views, URLs & Templates
nodes.description: Wire up URL routes to views and render dynamic templates.

nodes.title: Django Admin & Forms
nodes.description: Use the built-in admin site and Django forms for data entry and validation.

nodes.title: Authentication & Permissions
nodes.description: Implement user authentication, authorization, and permission checks.

nodes.title: Django REST Framework Basics
nodes.description: Build a simple REST API using Django REST Framework serializers and viewsets.

nodes.title: Flask Basics & Routing
nodes.description: Set up a Flask app and define routes with different HTTP methods.

nodes.title: Templates with Jinja2
nodes.description: Render dynamic HTML pages using the Jinja2 templating engine.

nodes.title: Request Handling & Forms
nodes.description: Process form data and request objects in Flask.

nodes.title: Flask Extensions
nodes.description: Integrate common extensions like Flask-SQLAlchemy and Flask-Login.

nodes.title: Blueprints & App Structure
nodes.description: Organize a larger Flask app into blueprints for modularity.

nodes.title: Error Handling & Testing
nodes.description: Add custom error handlers and write basic tests for Flask routes.

nodes.title: Spring Boot Basics & Setup
nodes.description: Bootstrap a Spring Boot application and understand auto-configuration.

nodes.title: Dependency Injection & Beans
nodes.description: Use Spring's IoC container to define and inject beans.

nodes.title: REST Controllers & Request Mapping
nodes.description: Build REST endpoints using @RestController and request mapping annotations.

nodes.title: Spring Data JPA
nodes.description: Persist data using Spring Data JPA repositories and entity mappings.

nodes.title: Configuration & Profiles
nodes.description: Manage application configuration with properties files and environment profiles.

nodes.title: Spring Security Basics
nodes.description: Add basic authentication and authorization using Spring Security.

nodes.title: Laravel Basics & Installation
nodes.description: Install Laravel and understand its MVC folder structure.

nodes.title: Routing & Controllers
nodes.description: Define routes and controllers to handle incoming HTTP requests.

nodes.title: Eloquent ORM
nodes.description: Model database tables and relationships using Laravel's Eloquent ORM.

nodes.title: Blade Templates
nodes.description: Build dynamic views using Laravel's Blade templating engine.

nodes.title: Middleware & Validation
nodes.description: Apply middleware for request filtering and validate incoming data.

nodes.title: Artisan CLI & Migrations
nodes.description: Use the Artisan command line tool and write database migrations.

nodes.title: ASP.NET Core Basics & Setup
nodes.description: Create a new ASP.NET Core project and understand its startup configuration.

nodes.title: Controllers & Routing
nodes.description: Build API controllers and define attribute-based routing.

nodes.title: Middleware Pipeline
nodes.description: Understand and customize the ASP.NET Core middleware request pipeline.

nodes.title: Entity Framework Core Basics
nodes.description: Model data and query a database using Entity Framework Core.

nodes.title: Dependency Injection
nodes.description: Use the built-in DI container to register and consume services.

nodes.title: Authentication & Authorization
nodes.description: Secure endpoints using ASP.NET Core's identity and authorization policies.

nodes.title: MySQL Basics & Data Types
nodes.description: Learn MySQL's data types and how to create and structure tables.

nodes.title: Writing Queries: SELECT, WHERE, JOIN
nodes.description: Practice filtering, sorting, and joining data across multiple tables.

nodes.title: Indexes & Query Optimization
nodes.description: Understand how indexes work and use EXPLAIN to optimize slow queries.

nodes.title: Transactions & ACID
nodes.description: Learn transaction control and how MySQL ensures ACID properties.

nodes.title: Stored Procedures & Triggers
nodes.description: Write stored procedures and triggers to encapsulate database logic.

nodes.title: Backup, Replication & User Management
nodes.description: Understand basic backup strategies, replication setup, and managing MySQL users/permissions.

nodes.title: SQLite Basics & Use Cases
nodes.description: Understand when SQLite is appropriate and how it differs from client-server databases.

nodes.title: Creating Tables & Data Types
nodes.description: Create tables and learn SQLite's flexible type system.

nodes.title: Queries & Joins in SQLite
nodes.description: Write SELECT queries and joins against a SQLite database.

nodes.title: Transactions in SQLite
nodes.description: Use transactions to ensure data consistency in SQLite.

nodes.title: SQLite in Application Code
nodes.description: Embed SQLite in an application using a language driver or ORM.

nodes.title: Limitations & Migration Strategies
nodes.description: Understand SQLite's concurrency limits and how to migrate to a server-based DB when needed.

nodes.title: OAuth 2.0 Concepts & Roles
nodes.description: Learn the roles in OAuth 2.0: resource owner, client, authorization server, and resource server.

nodes.title: Authorization Code Flow
nodes.description: Walk through the authorization code grant flow step by step.

nodes.title: Access & Refresh Tokens
nodes.description: Understand the purpose and lifecycle of access tokens versus refresh tokens.

nodes.title: OAuth Grant Types
nodes.description: Compare grant types like client credentials, implicit (legacy), and PKCE.

nodes.title: OpenID Connect Basics
nodes.description: Learn how OpenID Connect extends OAuth 2.0 for authentication.

nodes.title: Implementing OAuth in an API
nodes.description: Integrate an OAuth provider to protect an API with token-based access.

nodes.title: JS Syntax & Variables
nodes.description: Learn JavaScript's syntax, variable scoping (var/let/const), and data types.

nodes.title: Functions & Closures
nodes.description: Understand functions, higher-order functions, and closures.

nodes.title: Objects, Arrays & Prototypes
nodes.description: Work with objects, arrays, and JavaScript's prototype-based inheritance.

nodes.title: Asynchronous JS: Promises & Async/Await
nodes.description: Handle async operations using callbacks, Promises, and async/await.

nodes.title: ES6+ Features
nodes.description: Use modern JS features like destructuring, spread/rest, template literals, and modules.

nodes.title: Event Loop & Runtime Basics
nodes.description: Understand the JavaScript event loop, call stack, and how Node's runtime executes code.

nodes.title: TypeScript Basics & Types
nodes.description: Learn TypeScript's basic types and how the compiler enforces type safety.

nodes.title: Interfaces & Type Aliases
nodes.description: Define custom shapes for data using interfaces and type aliases.

nodes.title: Generics
nodes.description: Write reusable, type-safe functions and classes using generics.

nodes.title: Advanced Types
nodes.description: Explore union, intersection, and mapped types for flexible type modeling.

nodes.title: tsconfig & Compilation
nodes.description: Configure tsconfig.json and understand the TypeScript compilation process.

nodes.description: Apply TypeScript typings in a Node.js/Express backend project.

nodes.title: Git Basics & Repositories
nodes.description: Initialize repositories and learn the add/commit/status workflow.

nodes.title: Branching & Merging
nodes.description: Create branches and merge changes back into main lines of development.

nodes.description: Practice identifying and resolving merge conflicts.

nodes.title: Remote Repos & Collaboration
nodes.description: Push, pull, and collaborate using remotes and pull requests.

nodes.title: Rebase, Cherry-pick & History
nodes.description: Rewrite history with rebase and cherry-pick, and inspect logs effectively.

nodes.title: Git Workflows
nodes.description: Compare common workflows like GitFlow and trunk-based development.

nodes.title: Node.js Basics & Event Loop
nodes.description: Understand Node's single-threaded, event-driven architecture.

nodes.title: Modules & npm
nodes.description: Use CommonJS/ESM modules and manage packages with npm.

nodes.title: File System & Streams
nodes.description: Read and write files and process data efficiently using streams.

nodes.title: Building HTTP Servers
nodes.description: Create a basic HTTP server using Node's core http module.

nodes.title: Async Patterns in Node
nodes.description: Apply callbacks, Promises, and async/await idiomatically in Node.

nodes.title: Debugging & Performance
nodes.description: Debug Node applications and identify common performance bottlenecks.

nodes.description: Set up an Express app and define routes for different HTTP verbs.

nodes.title: Middleware
nodes.description: Write and apply middleware functions for logging, parsing, and auth.

nodes.title: Request/Response Handling
nodes.description: Work with request/response objects to read input and send output.

nodes.title: Error Handling
nodes.description: Implement centralized error-handling middleware in Express.

nodes.title: Templating & Static Files
nodes.description: Serve static assets and render templates with an Express app.

nodes.title: Building REST APIs with Express
nodes.description: Structure a complete REST API with routers and controllers.

nodes.description: Understand Nest's modular, Angular-inspired architecture.

nodes.title: Modules, Controllers & Providers

nodes.title: Dependency Injection in Nest
nodes.description: Use Nest's DI container to manage service dependencies.

nodes.description: Define and query one-to-many and many-to-many relations.

nodes.description: Write SELECT queries with joins, filtering, and aggregation.

nodes.description: Use indexes and EXPLAIN ANALYZE to optimize query performance.

nodes.description: Understand transaction control and Postgres isolation levels.

nodes.description: Create views, functions, and triggers to encapsulate logic in the database.

nodes.description: Learn basic backup strategies, replication, and useful Postgres extensions.

nodes.description: Write basic SELECT statements with filtering and sorting.

nodes.description: Combine tables with joins and summarize data with GROUP BY and aggregate functions.

nodes.description: Use subqueries and common table expressions to structure complex queries.

nodes.description: Understand how indexes affect query performance.

nodes.description: Design clean, resource-oriented URIs for an API.
